channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Orthopedics)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Orthopedics) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Geriatric tibial plateau fractures: A multicenter analysis of complications and treatment strategies
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Orthopedics Score: 32 Autoren: P. Martin, F. Springer, M. Klaut, M. Bormann, C. Neidlein, J. Fürmetz, W. Böcker, L. Keppler Journal: Injury Veröffentlicht: 2026-08-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.injury.2026.113470 ISSN: 0020-1383 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-24

item.title: Re-triage of severely injured patients in no-fault vs. at-fault states
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Orthopedics Score: 23 Autoren: Michael R. Visenio, Neil Thivalapill, Casey M. Silver, Gwyneth A. Sullivan, Arielle C. Thomas, Susheel Reddy, Mira Ghneim, Jessica L. Ryan, Etienne L. Pracht, Marie L. Crandall, Alexander Lundberg, Anne M. Stey Journal: Injury Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.injury.2026.113466 ISSN: 0020-1383 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-24

item.title: Early EMG-based Low Supraspinatus Activity Exercises After Arthroscopic Repair of Medium-Sized Rotator Cuff Tears: A Randomized Controlled Trial
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Orthopedics Score: 22 Autoren: Gamze Kuş, Derya Çelik, Ata Can Atalar Journal: Journal of Shoulder and Elbow Surgery Veröffentlicht: 2026-07-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jse.2026.06.028 ISSN: 1058-2746 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-24

item.title: Unsupervised Machine Learning Drives Dynamic Alignment Classification in Navigated Total Knee Arthroplasty
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Orthopedics Score: 19 Autoren: Alexa K. Pius, Prudhvi T. Chinimilli, Laurent D. Angibaud, Amaury Jung, Corey A. Jackson, James I. Huddleston Journal: The Journal of Arthroplasty Veröffentlicht: 2026-07-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.arth.2026.04.091 ISSN: 0883-5403 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-24

item.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Orthopedics Score: 13 Autoren: David F. Hanff, Solveig Thorarinsdottir, Adam Weir, Andrea B. Mosler, Willem M. P. Heijboer, Pim van Klij, Mathias Fabricius Nielsen Journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy Veröffentlicht: 2026-07-01 Abstract: SYNOPSIS: Pubic-related groin pain is one of the least common clinical entities of groin pain in athletes. However, it can cause persistent and long-standing pain. In this Viewpoint, we summarize the current state of knowledge regarding terminology, underlying pathology and diagnosis, and imaging findings for pubic-related groin pain. We share new perspectives on the clinical presentation, sex-related differences, examination, the role of diagnostic imaging, and how examination findings may direct management. J Orthop Sports Phys Ther 2026;56(7):376-381. Epub 12 February 2026. doi:10.2519/jospt.2026.13827 DOI: 10.2519/jospt.2026.13827 ISSN: 0190-6011 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-24
